generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides real-time occupancy data for adaptive control systems in BOREALIS project, integrated via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for IoT connectivity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects environmental metrics (e.g., temperature, humidity, light levels) from building infrastructure, normalized via Eclipse Ditto for consistency."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyUsageSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors real-time energy consumption across building systems, ingested via Eclipse Hono for bidirectional synchronization with BCS."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyUsageDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized sensor for lighting control systems (TwinLight project), providing real-time luminosity data for adaptive policies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor suite used in BOREALIS for iterative refinement of reinforcement learning policies based on actual usage patterns."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalConditionSensor
]

instance EnergyUsageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyUsageSensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance PostOccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model serving as semantic backbone, enriched with runtime metadata (sensor configurations, control logic) for model-driven transformations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimEnrichmentEnabler, DittoThingModelEnabler
]

instance RuntimeMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured metadata extracted from BIM models containing sensor configurations, device endpoints, and control logic specifications."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimEnrichmentEnabler, DittoThingModelEnabler
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized operational data from IoT sensors and BCS, ingested via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for consistency across building systems."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, EnergyUsageDataTransmitted, PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoThingModelEnabler, ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

instance ControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning policies for adaptive decision-making (BOREALIS project), balancing energy consumption, visual comfort, and health effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D model rendered in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring of building performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance ThingModelRepresentation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto Thing Model representations enabling device abstraction and interoperability for building control systems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoThingModelEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BimEnrichmentEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering toolset for automating BIM model enrichment with runtime metadata (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations)."
    DTDFVocab:enables BimToDigitalTwinTransformationService, AutomatedControlConfigurationService
]

instance DittoThingModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto framework for digital twin management, bidirectional communication, and Thing Model-based device abstraction."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIngestionService, DeviceAbstractionService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity, device management, and real-time data ingestion from building sensors."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIngestionService, SensorDataNormalizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning framework implementing adaptive control policies (BOREALIS) for energy optimization and visual comfort."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform for rich, interactive 3D visualization of building operations and performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ScenarioTestingService
]

instance ModelToTextTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tool for generating runtime configurations from enriched BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides immersive 3D visualization of building performance (e.g., energy usage, occupancy patterns) via Unreal Engine 5 interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceInsight, OperationalStateInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Uses reinforcement learning to optimize energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects based on real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectInsight
]

instance AutomatedControlConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables bidirectional synchronization between virtual models and physical actuators (e.g., lighting, HVAC) via automated control logic generation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlSignalAction, BidirectionalSynchronizationAction
]

instance ScenarioTestingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows evaluation of design changes or operational adjustments through simulation before physical implementation."
    DTDFVocab:provides DesignImpactInsight, OperationalAdjustmentInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ingests and normalizes real-time operational data from IoT sensors and BCS via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides NormalizedDataInsight, SensorDataConsistencyInsight
]

instance DeviceAbstractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides standardized device abstraction through Eclipse Ditto Thing Models for interoperability across building systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceInteroperabilityInsight, AutomatedDeviceDiscoveryInsight
]

instance BimToDigitalTwinTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automates extraction of structured representations from BIM to generate deployable digital twin artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:provides DigitalTwinArtifactInsight, DataFidelityInsight
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Auto-deploys digital twin with minimal manual intervention using model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentAutomationInsight, ServiceIntegrationInsight
]

instance SensorDataNormalizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Normalizes and validates sensor data from heterogeneous sources to ensure consistency across building systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides NormalizedDataInsight
]

instance ControlLogicGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates automated control logic for building systems based on enriched BIM models and runtime metadata."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlSignalAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of key performance indicators (KPIs) such as energy usage, occupancy patterns, and environmental conditions."
]

instance OperationalStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current operational state of building systems including sensor readings, actuator statuses, and control logic execution."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics output recommending optimal energy consumption strategies based on reinforcement learning policies."
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of visual comfort metrics (e.g., illuminance levels, glare reduction) for occupant well-being."
]

instance HealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluation of non-visual health effects (e.g., circadian rhythm alignment) based on lighting and environmental conditions."
]

instance DesignImpactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results showing potential impact of design changes on building performance and operational efficiency."
]

instance OperationalAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for operational adjustments (e.g., HVAC setpoints, lighting schedules) based on scenario testing."
]

instance NormalizedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Consistently formatted and validated sensor data ready for processing by digital twin services."
]

instance SensorDataConsistencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results ensuring data consistency across heterogeneous sensor sources and building systems."
]

instance DeviceInteroperabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Standardized device representations enabling seamless communication between different building control systems."
]

instance AutomatedDeviceDiscoveryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automatically discovered and mapped devices with their configurations extracted from enriched BIM models."
]

instance DigitalTwinArtifactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deployable digital twin artifacts generated from BIM models with embedded runtime metadata."
]

instance DataFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation metrics ensuring high fidelity between physical asset data and digital twin representations."
]

instance DeploymentAutomationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated deployment pipeline status and configuration readiness for digital twin services."
]

instance ServiceIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of modular service integration via standardized extension points in the digital twin framework."
]

instance ControlSignalAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation and transmission of control signals to building actuators (e.g., lighting, HVAC)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BidirectionalSynchronizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Maintains continuous synchronization between virtual models and physical systems through real-time data exchange."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system actuator for adaptive lighting control (TwinLight project), receiving control signals from digital twin."
]

instance HvacActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuators for climate control, synchronized with digital twin via bidirectional communication."
]

instance SensorConfigurationActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated configuration of IoT sensors based on runtime metadata extracted from enriched BIM models."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interactions are enabled through **bidirectional control signals** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the physical Building Control Systems (BCS). The framework supports **automated commissioning** of devices (e.g., lighting systems, HVAC units) by leveraging **model-to-text transformations** to generate runtime configurations for actuators. **Eclipse Ditto** facilitates the **publishing of control commands** (e.g., dimming levels, temperature setpoints) to physical devices, while **Eclipse Hono** ensures secure and reliable message routing. The **TwinLight** project demonstrates this with **BIM-centric control configuration**, and **BOREALIS** extends it to **reinforcement learning-based adaptive control**, enabling dynamic adjustments to physical systems based on real-time feedback."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time synchronization** between the physical and virtual systems, ensuring continuous alignment. The framework supports **iterative policy refinement** (e.g., in BOREALIS) where control strategies are dynamically adjusted based on runtime data. While the exact latency is not specified, the system is designed for **low-latency interactions** to enable responsive operational adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: The **semantic backbone** providing spatial, geometric, and functional data.
  2. **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for **real-time data exchange** and **device abstraction**.
  3. **Control Layer**: **Building Control Systems (BCS)** and **reinforcement learning models** (e.g., **BOREALIS**) for adaptive decision-making.
  4. **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** for **immersive monitoring and simulation**.
  5. **Extension Layer**: **Modular services** (e.g., predictive maintenance, energy optimization) integrated via **standardized APIs**.
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** by allowing **independent scaling** of sub-systems (e.g., per-floor twins) while maintaining **global synchronization** through shared middleware."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers **all life cycle stages** of the building, from **design and construction** (as-designed representation) to **operation and refurbishment** (as-operated representation). During the **design phase**, the DT leverages BIM for **clash detection, performance simulation, and documentation**. In the **construction phase**, it supports **progress tracking and quality assurance**. During **operation**, the DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control** (e.g., via **BOREALIS**’ reinforcement learning). For **refurbishment**, the DT facilitates **what-if analysis** and **retrofit planning** by integrating as-built data with operational feedback. The framework ensures **long-term compatibility** with AECO standards (e.g., BIM, IFC) to support **legacy system integration** and **future-proofing**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the **degree of synchronization** between the DT and PT, addressing **semantic drift** (as discussed in [49]).
  2. **Automated validation** of BIM models (per [65]) to detect **inconsistencies** or **missing metadata** before deployment.
  3. **Real-time data normalization** via Eclipse Ditto to mitigate **sensor errors** or **data anomalies**.
  4. **Bidirectional synchronization** protocols to minimize **latency** and **data loss** during control signal transmission.
  5. **Uncertainty modeling** in **BOREALIS**’ reinforcement learning, where **post-occupancy data** iteratively refines control policies to reduce **prediction errors**.
  The framework also supports **verification and validation (V&V)** through **simulation testing** (e.g., Unreal Engine 5) and **real-world case studies** (e.g., Living Lab deployments)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and digital twin (DT) is established using **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for real-time data exchange. These middleware components facilitate **bidirectional communication** between sensors/actuators in the physical system and the DT’s virtual representation. The framework does not specify exact protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP) but relies on Hono/Ditto’s standardized interfaces for seamless integration."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework supports **horizontal integration** through **standardized extension points**, enabling interoperability with external systems. While specific external systems (e.g., ERP, CMMS) are not mentioned, the modular architecture allows for seamless integration of additional services or data sources, ensuring **scalable and extensible DT ecosystems**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the primary standard for semantic representation. It leverages **model-driven engineering (MDE)** principles to ensure consistency and reusability across the DT life cycle. While specific standards (e.g., IFC, OASIS MQTT) are not explicitly mentioned, the framework is designed to align with **AECO-specific standards** and **domain-specific workflows** (e.g., TwinLight, BOREALIS)."
]
